---
title: "Ahmad Mukhriz Putra"
description: "BSc Economics & Politics | University of Essex"
output: distill::distill_article
---

## About Me

I am a final-year BSc Economics and Politics student at the University of Essex.  
This website showcases my work from GV300.

## Pages

- [Landing Page](landing.html)
- [GV300 Showcase](showcase.html)
